@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mod_monolith
C: team(6)∧ddl("4 months")∧store("PostgreSQL")
P: ops(pt_devops)∧traffic(modest)
V: split(post_release)
A: small ∧ team ∧ tight ∧ ddl ∧ simple ∧ ops

[AUDIT]
Goal: modular_monolith.
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("4 months") and store("PostgreSQL").
Plan: ops(pt_devops) and traffic(modest).
Verify: split(post_release).
Answer target: small and team and tight and deadline and simple and ops.
